overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, starting from a street with passing vehicles and approaching a transit terminal with a large digital departure board. The scene features neon lighting, modern brutalist architecture, and sparse pedestrian activity typical of a high-end game engine render.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with vehicle traffic

events.description: yellow sports car drives away and exits the frame to the left
white pickup truck drives past from right to left in the background

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street toward the illuminated terminal entrance, observing futuristic vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car parked initially then accelerates and drives away
white pickup truck driving past the terminal entrance in the background

entered.detail: futuristic yellow sports car with white accents and glowing taillights

large illuminated digital display showing arrivals and departures with cyan text
dark asphalt road surface with distinctive orange lane markings and crosswalk lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, with a yellow sports car prominently visible on the left. The camera moves forward along the asphalt road toward a large terminal structure ahead. Several vehicles including a white pickup truck pass by in the background as the camera approaches the terminal entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered terminal entrance walkway with digital signage

events.description: entering the covered terminal area from the open street, moving under the concrete overhang
moving deeper under the overhang, artificial neon lighting becomes dominant over ambient city light

agents.ego_description: walking under the terminal overhang toward the large digital departure board, transitioning from outdoor street to sheltered walkway

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt walking near the terminal entrance doors

entered.detail: massive dark concrete pillars supporting the terminal overhang structure
automated glass entrance doors leading into the terminal building
orange illuminated benches along the terminal wall
short black metal bollards lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the terminal's concrete overhang, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered walkway. Large support pillars frame the view as the digital departure board becomes more prominent ahead. The lighting shifts to artificial neon, and a pedestrian in a green shirt appears near the terminal entrance doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: terminal entrance with large digital departure board and pedestrian traffic

events.description: passing the digital departure board on the left side as it moves out of the central view
large digital board temporarily fills the left portion of the view while passing closely

agents.ego_description: walking past the large digital departure board, observing the flight information display and navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward the terminal entrance
person walking past the digital board in the opposite direction

entered.detail: digital billboard displaying futuristic vehicle advertisements with glowing text

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes the massive digital departure board, which dominates the view with its cyan illuminated text showing arrivals and departures. Pedestrians appear scattered around the entrance area, walking in various directions. The camera moves past the board, which shifts from center to the left side of the frame, revealing more of the terminal walkway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: terminal walkway with benches and digital signage

events.description: moving past the departure board into the main terminal walkway with glass entrance doors visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the terminal walkway past the departure board, observing the terminal interior architecture and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking ahead on the terminal walkway

entered.detail: extended covered walkway with glass walls and ceiling structure visible ahead
screen displaying animated futuristic vehicle advertisement

segments.scene_description: Having passed the digital departure board, the camera continues along the terminal walkway. The scene shows the extended terminal interior with glass walls, orange benches, and digital advertisement screens. A pedestrian in white walks ahead in the distance as the camera moves deeper into the covered terminal area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from an open futuristic city street into the sheltered depths of a high-tech transit terminal. It begins on a dark asphalt road beside a yellow sports car, gliding past passing vehicles toward a massive concrete structure. As the camera moves under the terminal's heavy overhang, the open night air gives way to a sheltered walkway framed by support pillars and artificial neon lighting. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and passes a towering digital departure board glowing with cyan text, moving through a scattered crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the view opens into the terminal interior, passing orange benches and digital advertisements while following a distant figure in white deeper into the glass-walled concourse.
